Title: BMS SWC Architecture
Description: SWC_BatteryManagement shall be implemented as an AUTOSAR ApplicationSWC containing all battery state estimation, cell balancing, thermal management, and contactor control logic for the high-voltage traction battery pack.
Notes: Single SWC owns all BMS application logic; MCU runs at 12V, battery pack at 400V; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: SOC Estimation Runnable
Description: RE_EstimateSOC shall execute cyclically every 10 ms to compute the battery State-of-Charge using an extended Kalman filter. It shall call EKF_Predict(), EKF_Update(), and SOC_Clamp() helper functions and write the result to PP_SOCPercent.
Notes: 10 ms = 100 Hz; EKF runs two stages per cycle; req_type=TIMING

Title: Cell Balancing Runnable
Description: RE_BalanceCells shall execute cyclically every 100 ms to compare individual cell voltages and activate passive bleed resistors on cells above the mean. It shall call CalcCellDelta(), SelectBalanceCells(), and SetBalanceRelays().
Notes: 100 ms cycle; passive balancing only — no active topology; req_type=TIMING

Title: Thermal Management Runnable
Description: RE_ManageThermal shall execute cyclically every 50 ms to compute battery temperature gradient, control the cooling pump PWM duty cycle, and apply power derating when thermal limits are approached. Calls CalcTempGradient() and SetCoolingPWM().
Notes: 50 ms balances thermal inertia vs. response time; req_type=TIMING

Title: Safety Monitor Runnable
Description: RE_MonitorSafety shall execute cyclically every 5 ms to perform overcurrent, overvoltage, undervoltage, and overtemperature plausibility checks. On any fault it shall call OpenContactors() and set the corresponding DTC within the same 5 ms execution.
Notes: 5 ms = fastest cycle; safety actions must complete within one cycle; req_type=TIMING

Title: Contactor Control Runnable
Description: RE_ControlContactors shall execute on DataReceivedEvent of VehicleReadyStatus to manage precharge and main contactor sequence (OPEN → PRECHARGE → MAIN_CLOSE) and call VerifyContactorState() after each transition.
Notes: Event-driven; contactor sequence is safety-critical; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Initialization Runnable
Description: RE_Initialize shall execute once on ECU startup to read last known SOC from NVM via NvM_ReadBlock(NvM_BMS_SOCLog), perform cell voltage scan, validate sensor signals, and set SWC state to INIT. RAM CRC and ROM CRC-32 self-tests shall complete before any other runnable is allowed to execute.
Notes: NvM block ID: NvM_BMS_SOCLog; NvM_BMS_FaultLog; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Required Ports
Description: SWC shall declare: RP_PackCurrent (SR IF_SR_Current, range ±500 A, res 0.1 A, 10 ms cycle via CAN ID 0x610), RP_CellVoltages (SR IF_SR_CellArray, 96 cells × float32, 100 ms), RP_CellTemperatures (SR IF_SR_TempArray, 32 NTC sensors × float32, 50 ms), RP_VehicleReadyStatus (SR IF_SR_VehicleReady, boolean, event-driven), RP_AmbientTemperature (SR IF_SR_Temperature, float32, 1 s).
Notes: All R-Ports follow AUTOSAR RP_ naming convention; req_type=INTERFACE

Title: Provided Ports
Description: SWC shall declare: PP_SOCPercent (SR IF_SR_SOC, range 0.0–100.0 %, res 0.01 %, 10 ms), PP_SOHPercent (SR IF_SR_SOH, range 0.0–100.0 %, res 0.1 %, 1 s), PP_PackPowerLimit (SR IF_SR_PowerLimits, struct {f32ChargeLimitW, f32DischargeLimitW}, 50 ms), PP_BMSStatus (SR IF_SR_BMSStatus, struct {u8Mode, u8ActiveDTCs, u8BalancingActive}, 10 ms), PP_ContactorState (SR IF_SR_Contactor, enum {OPEN, PRECHARGE, CLOSED}, event-driven).
Notes: All P-Ports follow AUTOSAR PP_ naming convention; req_type=INTERFACE

Title: EKF State Prediction
Description: EKF_Predict() shall propagate the state vector [SOC, V_RC1, V_RC2] forward using the equivalent circuit model: SOC(k+1) = SOC(k) - (I_pack * DT) / Q_nom, V_RC1(k+1) = V_RC1(k) * exp(-DT / tau1) + I_pack * R1 * (1 - exp(-DT / tau1)), V_RC2(k+1) = V_RC2(k) * exp(-DT / tau2) + I_pack * R2 * (1 - exp(-DT / tau2)). DT = 0.01 s, Q_nom from calibration, tau1/tau2/R1/R2 from OCV-SOC lookup.
Notes: ECM = 2nd-order RC equivalent circuit model; tau1=30s, tau2=300s typical; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: EKF Measurement Update
Description: EKF_Update() shall compute the Kalman gain K = P_pred * H^T / (H * P_pred * H^T + R) and correct the state estimate: x_est = x_pred + K * (V_meas - V_model), where V_model = OCV(SOC) + V_RC1 + V_RC2 + I_pack * R0. Covariance P_est = (I - K * H) * P_pred. Measurement noise R = 1e-4 V^2; process noise Q_SOC = 1e-8 per step.
Notes: OCV(SOC) is a 101-point lookup table stored as calibration ROM array; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: SOC Clamping
Description: SOC_Clamp() shall ensure the final SOC estimate is clamped to the range [SOC_MIN = 5.0 %, SOC_MAX = 95.0 %] before writing to PP_SOCPercent. If the raw EKF estimate exceeds 95.0 % or falls below 5.0 % for more than 10 consecutive cycles, DTC_BMS_SOC_LIMIT (0xB10003) shall be set.
Notes: Clamping protects battery from full charge / full discharge damage; req_type=SAFETY

Title: Current Integration Backup
Description: When V_meas is unavailable (sensor timeout > 20 ms), RE_EstimateSOC shall fall back to pure coulomb counting: SOC(k+1) = SOC(k) - (I_pack * DT) / Q_nom and set bit[0] of PP_BMSStatus.u8Mode to indicate degraded estimation. Coulomb counting accumulation error shall not exceed ±2% SOC per hour.
Notes: Degraded mode flag is read by instrument cluster for warning lamp; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Cell Delta Calculation
Description: CalcCellDelta() shall compute V_mean = sum(V_cell[i], i=0..95) / 96 and V_delta[i] = V_cell[i] - V_mean for each of the 96 cells. Cells with V_delta[i] > BALANCE_THRESHOLD_V (15 mV) are marked as candidates in l_u8BalanceMask bitmask (96 bits = 12 bytes).
Notes: BALANCE_THRESHOLD_V stored as calibration constant in ROM; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Balancing Cell Selection Limit
Description: SelectBalanceCells() shall limit the number of simultaneously active bleed resistors to MAX_SIMULTANEOUS_BALANCE = 8 to prevent excessive heat generation. If more than 8 cells exceed the threshold, the 8 cells with highest V_delta shall be selected.
Notes: 8-cell limit determined by thermal analysis of PCB heat dissipation; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Balance Relay Control
Description: SetBalanceRelays() shall write the selected l_u8BalanceMask to the cell monitoring IC via SPI within 1 ms of being called. Balancing shall be inhibited (all relays open) when pack current I_pack > 5 A (charging or discharging) to prevent measurement interference.
Notes: Cell monitoring IC: LTC6811-2 compatible protocol; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Temperature Gradient Calculation
Description: CalcTempGradient() shall compute T_max = max(T_cell[i], i=0..31), T_min = min(T_cell[i], i=0..31), and T_gradient = T_max - T_min. If T_gradient > TEMP_GRADIENT_LIMIT_K (8 K) for more than 5 consecutive 50 ms cycles, DTC_BMS_TEMP_GRADIENT (0xB10006) shall be set.
Notes: High gradient indicates cooling blockage or cell degradation; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Cooling PWM Control
Description: SetCoolingPWM() shall compute the PWM duty cycle for the cooling pump as: duty_cycle = K_COOL_P * (T_max - T_TARGET_K) + K_COOL_I * integral_error, where T_TARGET_K = 298.15 K (25 °C), K_COOL_P = 5.0 %/K, K_COOL_I = 0.1 %/(K·s). Duty cycle shall be clamped to [PWM_MIN = 0 %, PWM_MAX = 100 %].
Notes: PI controller; integral windup protection: clamp integral when output saturated; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Thermal Power Derating
Description: RE_ManageThermal shall compute power derating factor: derate = 1.0 - clamp((T_max - T_DERATE_START_K) / T_DERATE_RANGE_K, 0.0, 1.0), where T_DERATE_START_K = 313.15 K (40 °C), T_DERATE_RANGE_K = 20 K. PP_PackPowerLimit.f32DischargeLimitW = P_MAX_W * derate. P_MAX_W = 150000 W (150 kW).
Notes: Linear derating from 100% at 40 °C to 0% at 60 °C; req_type=SAFETY

Title: Overcurrent Detection
Description: RE_MonitorSafety shall check I_pack against I_MAX_DISCHARGE = 300 A and I_MAX_CHARGE = -150 A every 5 ms. If I_pack > I_MAX_DISCHARGE or I_pack < I_MAX_CHARGE for more than 2 consecutive cycles (10 ms debounce), OpenContactors() shall be called and DTC_BMS_OVERCURRENT (0xB10001) set.
Notes: 2-cycle debounce = 10 ms worst case; hardware fuse triggers at 500 A; req_type=SAFETY

Title: Overvoltage / Undervoltage Detection
Description: RE_MonitorSafety shall check every cell voltage against V_CELL_MAX = 4.20 V and V_CELL_MIN = 2.50 V every 5 ms. If any cell exceeds V_CELL_MAX or drops below V_CELL_MIN for 2 consecutive cycles, OpenContactors() shall be called and the corresponding DTC DTC_BMS_OVERVOLTAGE (0xB10004) or DTC_BMS_UNDERVOLTAGE (0xB10005) set.
Notes: Per-cell check on all 96 cells; first violating cell ID stored in DTC snapshot; req_type=SAFETY

Title: Overtemperature Detection
Description: RE_MonitorSafety shall check T_max against T_CELL_MAX_K = 333.15 K (60 °C) every 5 ms. If T_max exceeds T_CELL_MAX_K for 4 consecutive cycles (20 ms), OpenContactors() shall be called and DTC_BMS_OVERTEMP (0xB10002) set. Recovery shall require manual service reset; automatic recovery is inhibited.
Notes: Overtemp latch requires service reset to prevent repeated thermal damage; req_type=SAFETY

Title: Open Contactor Function
Description: OpenContactors() shall: (1) set PP_ContactorState = OPEN, (2) zero PP_PackPowerLimit.f32DischargeLimitW and f32ChargeLimitW, (3) call Dem_ReportErrorStatus() for the triggering DTC, (4) call NvM_WriteBlock(NvM_BMS_FaultLog) to persist the fault record. All four steps shall complete within the 5 ms RE_MonitorSafety window.
Notes: NvM write is non-blocking (deferred write mode) — does not block 5 ms cycle; req_type=SAFETY

Title: Precharge Sequence
Description: RE_ControlContactors shall implement the precharge sequence when VehicleReadyStatus transitions from OFF to ON: (1) Close precharge relay, set PP_ContactorState = PRECHARGE; (2) Monitor V_DC_link via RP_DCLinkVoltage; (3) When V_DC_link >= 0.95 * V_pack_nominal close main contactor; (4) Open precharge relay, set PP_ContactorState = CLOSED. Sequence timeout = 2 s; abort to OPEN if exceeded.
Notes: Precharge limits inrush current; 95% threshold from inverter capacitor spec; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: Contactor State Verification
Description: VerifyContactorState() shall read back the physical contactor status from the contactor feedback pins via RP_ContactorFeedback and compare against the commanded state. If commanded != actual for more than 50 ms, DTC_BMS_CONTACTOR_WELD (0xB10007) shall be set and the system shall transition to FAIL_SAFE mode.
Notes: Contactor weld detection is an ASIL-D requirement; 50 ms = 10 contactor cycles; req_type=SAFETY

Title: SOH Estimation
Description: RE_EstimateSOC shall update State-of-Health every full charge cycle by computing Q_meas = integral(I_pack * DT) over one full charge from SOC = 10 % to SOC = 90 %, then SOH = (Q_meas / Q_nom_new) * 100 %. Q_nom_new = 100 Ah (rated new capacity). Result shall be written to PP_SOHPercent and stored in NvM_BMS_SOCLog.
Notes: SOH degrades from 100% (new) to <80% (end-of-life threshold per ISO 6469); req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: DTC SOC Limit Exceeded
Description: DTC_BMS_SOC_LIMIT (0xB10003) shall be reported via Dem_ReportErrorStatus when the EKF raw SOC estimate exceeds SOC_MAX = 95 % or falls below SOC_MIN = 5 % for 10 consecutive 10 ms cycles. Snapshot data: raw_SOC, I_pack, V_pack_avg.
Notes: DTC snapshot stored via Dem_GetEventFreezeFrameData; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: DTC Healing
Description: All healable DTCs (0xB10001 through 0xB10007 excluding overtemp latch 0xB10002) shall be cleared automatically after 5 consecutive fault-free evaluation cycles. Healing counters shall be reset on each fault recurrence.
Notes: Overtemp latch (0xB10002) requires manual reset; all others auto-heal; req_type=FUNCTIONAL

Title: E2E Protection
Description: All safety-relevant CAN input signals (RP_PackCurrent, RP_CellVoltages, RP_CellTemperatures) shall be protected by AUTOSAR E2E Profile 2. E2E counter mismatch on RP_PackCurrent shall trigger DTC_BMS_CAN_TIMEOUT (0xB10008) after 3 consecutive failures at 10 ms cycle.
Notes: E2E counter timeout = 30 ms worst case; req_type=SAFETY

Title: Watchdog Supervision
Description: RE_MonitorSafety shall trigger the hardware watchdog via Rte_Call every 5 ms. A missed watchdog trigger shall cause the ASIL-D hardware watchdog to reset the ECU. On restart, the SWC shall detect the watchdog reset cause via McuResetCause register and set DTC_BMS_WATCHDOG (0xB10009).
Notes: Hardware watchdog is independent of software — ASIL-D decomposition; req_type=SAFETY
